texto: Writing fiction feels like an adventurous act, nudging aside reality a word at a time.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a James Van Pelt: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Writing fiction feels like an adventurous act, nudging aside reality a word at a time.” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, fiction, fiction-writing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de fiction-writing e writing.

texto: The teacher took two long strides and stood beside Parker’s desk. Before the boy could speak, Mr. Earl threw the desktop open. For a second, he stared into it. A white glow reflected off his face.“What is this?” he said, as he reached toward the brightness. “Careful, Mr. Earl,” Parker started to say, but it was too late.The teacher screeched before lurching against the desk. He went down quickly, his feet vanishing into the desk last.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de James Van Pelt que provoca temas ligados a educacao. Ao questionar “The teacher took two long strides and stood beside Parker’s desk. Before the boy could speak, Mr.…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, absurd, writing, com foco em writing.

A white glow reflected off his face.“What is this?” he said, as he reached toward the brightness. “Careful, Mr. Earl,” Parker started to say, but it was too late.The teacher screeched before lurching against the desk. He went down quickly, his feet vanishing into the desk last.
